productDisplayName: Puma Men South Africa  Navy Blue Track Pant
description: Composition Navy blue track pants made of 100% nylon on the outside with an inner lining of 100% polyester till the knees and 100% nylon from the knees to the hem, has a broad elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inseam, two zippered pockets on the sides, toggle straps and zippers on either sides of the hem and embroidered branding below the left pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours using lukewarm water Do not bleach, or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron on decorations Designed for the man who never compromises on comfort and style, this trackpant from puma is crafted from a nylon/polyester blend fabric to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit. The inner blended mesh lining ensures you enjoy your training sessions and casual outings in sweat-free comfort, while the sporty effect makes you look stylish. Add on a sporty t-shirt and sneakers. Model Statistics Model is a size M of height 6' and waist 28"
